message:
fix(node): resolve migration compile regressions and harden verifier toolkit against non-finite floats

Migration module (crates/franken-node/src/migration/mod.rs):
- Add explicit Vec<PathBuf> type annotations in run_audit() and run_rewrite()
  to fix unsized-type compile errors surfaced by cargo check --all-targets
- Change collect_risky_script_names() to return owned Strings via .to_string()
  instead of cloning BTreeMap keys, fixing a type mismatch between &str/String
- Add collect_risky_script_names_returns_sorted_owned_names regression test
  validating the function identifies install/postinstall as risky scripts

Verifier toolkit (crates/franken-node/src/tools/verifier_toolkit.rs):
- Add seed_float_token() that encodes f64 values via their bit representation
  (0x{:016x} format) to produce deterministic, non-finite-safe hash inputs
  rather than relying on Display formatting which produces "NaN"/"inf"/"-inf"
  that conflate distinct bit patterns
- Add seed_string_map() for deterministic BTreeMap serialization in run-seed
  generation, ensuring reproducible verifier claim digests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
